title: Holy Shit Moments Spoilers
wikitext:
[]: "Holy Shit" Moments (spoilers)             Quote Post by quixote77 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 5:04 am To all those that have seen the 2.0 movie: We're all a jaded bunch, we've seen a crapload of cookie cutter content in the media. But there comes a time, or scene in this case where you just have to say those two awe-drenched words: "Holy Shit". Any of you have one of these H.S. moments while watching 2.0? Mine were: 1. Mari activating the beast and launching herself at Zeruel's A.T. Fields 2. Shinji stepping up (you know the scene) and beating the crap out of Zeruel, not in some panicked insane rage, or by dissolving into LCL while his mom does the legwork, but by sheer will!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 6:59 pm Well,since I only saw the 25 minute camrip,I have to say the first two you put were my fav's as well as when Unit 01 initiated third impact.Or the begining anyway.That was awsome.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:02 pm Reading Ornette's review. I haven't seen the cam rip yet. I will in 9 days. But reading the review I was going 'HOLY SHIT!!' through the entire thing. Especially when I figured out what happend to Asuka.........

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:03 pm 1) Tunnely vs Eva-05. 2) The whole Sahaquiel battle. 3) Shinji and Yui doing their respective things against Zeruel. Clocky versus Eva-02 was just awesome while Bardiel was sad.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:22 pm 1) Mari watching the giant cross 'plosions of Eva 05 and Tunniel 2) Debris hitting Misato's car 3) The picnic at the aquarium (for some reason I just think the animation was GORGEOUS right there) 4) Unit 01 getting the munchies for Bardiel 5) Beast Mode Mari

[]:             Quote Post by cambaprecoz » Fri Jul 17, 2009 7:38 pm The marathoning Evangelions. The whole sequence from start to finish. Until Eva 01 does the stupid "Sonic the Hedgehog" run, why Anno, why? And afterwards when Shinji is all "AT field, deploy!" and this kickass violins start playing, you know shit's serious. My favorite battle, even more than the final one.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:11 pm The impalement of Eva-01 by Kaworu and the Lance of Longinus. Asuka's entry (not as good as the original, but still freaking sweet to see Eva-02 use the jetpack to go all Boba Fett on the Clock Angel).

[]:             Quote Post by quixote77 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:29 pm Another one, Rei pushing the maimed Mari out of the way before the missile explodes. Mostly because Rei doesn't know who Mari is and it serves as a testament to her character growth in the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by evaunit13 » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:47 pm 05 was cool but not as epic as the other scenes, maybe because the camrip couldn't capture what was already a dark scene 02 arriving sahaqiuel bardiel zeruel pretty much all the angels the bardiel scene was one of the few times in an anime where i thought "oh shit no way" because of 01 biting down on the plug and Asuka's scream the kindergarten songs during bardiel and zeruel were awesome scene's of irony, having kids sing while blood is everywhere gives a great foil against each other

[]:             Quote Post by Marduk » Fri Jul 17, 2009 8:52 pm - Zeruel gobbling up Unit-00 ala Saunich der Hejhaug. - Zeruel growing boobs????? - Mari and Unit-02 going ZA WARU--err, BEAST mode - 3I almost initiating. - Gendo in the drifting limo like a badass mobster. - The fact that NERV got the whole city rigged up as a marathon track
